title: Kristin kommenderar
writer: Gardar Sahlberg, Gustaf Edgren, Theodor Berthels
actors: Dagmar Ebbesen, Wanda Rothgardt, Gunnar Björnstrand
plot: Translator Vilhelm and his young wife have a child, as well as a grumpy house maid who doesn't hesitate to give her opinion on how they behave as parents. In secret Kristin arranges a scholarship for Vilhelm so he can go back to h...
